name: pantheon
description: The Pantheon marketplace — tools for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: metis
plugins.description: A lightweight toolset for keeping a project's intent, status, and history legible across agent sessions.

plugins.name: iris
plugins.description: Cross-tool context bridge between Claude Code and Codex. Logs your conversation and exposes it to the other tool so you can hand off plans, share context, and pick up where the other tool left off.
